hook: A remote-work travel concierge that picks the city, the apartment, and the coworking space you'll actually love.
core_problem: 35M global digital nomads spend 8-15 hrs/wk planning moves; Airbnb + Workfrom + Nomad List don't talk to each other.
ai_leverage: Preference-learning agent baselines user; planning agent picks city + housing + coworking + community for next 4-12 weeks.
distribution_strategy: Nomad community channels + Airbnb host network + remote-co partnerships.
retention_loop: Per-user preference + history corpus + community lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user multi-trip preference + outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo nomads. Stage 2: nomad couples + families. Stage 3: full distributed-living OS for remote teams.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the preference + outcome corpus
commoditization_collapse: community + multi-source orchestration moat
validation_invocation: Per-user multi-trip preference data is asymmetric; single-platform competitors see one trip.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Airbnb/Booking APIs + Workfrom
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user preferences, trip outcomes, city-level metadata.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any booking >$2k; trust + safety review host issues.

ui_ux_invocation: User says 'next stop in 3 weeks, beach + reliable wifi, $2k budget'; agent returns 3 options.

hook: An invisible loyalty optimizer that books the same flights but earns you 4x the miles.
core_problem: 150M frequent flyers leave $2-8k/yr in miles on the table; existing tools (Award Hacker, ExpertFlyer) require expert intent.
ai_leverage: Optimization agent compares cash + award + transfer-partner routes; booking agent executes via OBT (online booking tool) integrations.
distribution_strategy: Travel-blog community + corporate travel policy partnerships.
retention_loop: Per-user point balance + booking history lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user balance + redemption corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: Software-only; travel-API integration depth gates scaling.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C frequent flyers. Stage 2: corporate travel. Stage 3: full points-as-a-service infrastructure for issuers.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the optimization model
regulatory_blind_spot: airline ToS + screen-scrape compliance
validation_invocation: Per-user multi-program balance data is asymmetric; single-issuer apps are blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Duffel/Sabre APIs + Plaid Travel
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user point balances, fare/award availability, transfer ratios.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any booking; airline-ToS review on integration changes.

ui_ux_invocation: User books like normal; agent reroutes through best points combo silently.

hook: A visa workflow OS that turns 12-month immigration timelines into 3-month executions.
core_problem: 180k US H-1B + EU Blue Card cases; immigration lawyers charge $5-15k + 8-12 month timelines; communication is opaque.
ai_leverage: Document-classification agent ingests case packets; status-monitor agent tracks USCIS/Schengen progress; drafting agent writes responses.
monetization_logic: $199-499/mo per active case + bar-licensed attorney review at fixed price.
distribution_strategy: HR team + employer mobility partnerships; PLG via free 'check my status' wedge.
retention_loop: Per-employer + per-case history compounds; switching loses status continuity.

moat_potential.rationale: USCIS + EU agency-integration depth + bar partnerships.

scalability_rationale: B2B sales cycle 3-6 months; once integrated, expansion fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: H-1B + Blue Card. Stage 2: full intra-company transfer + nomad visas. Stage 3: global mobility OS for employers.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: UPL + per-jurisdiction immigration rules
fake_ai_trap: bar-licensed attorney signs every filing
validation_invocation: Defensible regulatory + workflow moat; reject vanity case counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + DocuSign + USCIS API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-employer case corpus, USCIS/EU response patterns, attorney panel.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + KMS-encrypted document store; SOC 2 + state bar.

ui_ux_invocation: HR + employee see live status; attorney reviews + signs each step.

hook: Corporate travel offsets that are actually verified, not voodoo.
core_problem: $1.4T global corporate travel; carbon offsets are mostly unverifiable; CFOs demand audit trail; current providers (Pachama, Sustaira) target catalysts not workflow.
ai_leverage: Booking-ingest agent quantifies CO2 per trip; offset-procurement agent buys verified credits + retires them; reporting agent generates SEC-ready disclosures.
distribution_strategy: Corporate travel managers + sustainability officer ICP.
retention_loop: Per-company travel history + reporting audit trail lock.

moat_potential.rationale: SEC + CSRD reporting integration creates switching cost.

scalability_rationale: Enterprise sales cycle slow; once installed, expansion fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: corporate travel. Stage 2: full Scope 3 emissions OS. Stage 3: licensed disclosure platform for SEC + EU.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: SEC climate rules + EU CSRD alignment
fake_ai_trap: third-party verification of every credit retired
validation_invocation: Defensible audit trail + regulatory moat; reject greenwash.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-trip emissions, credit registry, audit trail.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Sustainability officer signs every report; ops verifies any credit purchase >$50k.

ui_ux_invocation: Sustainability officer sees a dashboard; chat to ask 'what's our Q2 footprint' with audit-grade answer.

hook: A travel-disruption agent that rebooks you mid-flight before the cancellation announcement.
core_problem: 1.3M US flights cancel/yr; rebooking takes hours; travelers lose meetings + missed flights cascade.
ai_leverage: Disruption-prediction agent watches FAA + ATC + carrier ops; rebooking agent executes within carrier ToS using stored credentials.
retention_loop: Per-user travel history + carrier ToS expertise lock.
scalability_rationale: API + scraping; scales with API costs.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C frequent flyers. Stage 2: corporate travel + concierge. Stage 3: full travel-resilience platform.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: airline ToS + DOT consumer protection
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the rebooking automation
validation_invocation: Defensible automation + per-airline corpus; reject vanity install counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Ops reviews any disputed rebooking; user approves any incremental cost.

ui_ux_invocation: User boards flight; if cancellation looms, agent rebooks + texts new itinerary.

hook: A local-experience curator that finds the dinner spot a Lisbon native would actually take you.
core_problem: 180M+ international travelers/yr default to TripAdvisor's mediocre top-10s; Airbnb Experiences faded; local trust signals are missing.
ai_leverage: Local-resident agent ingests verified local picks + reviews; matching agent personalizes per traveler taste.
distribution_strategy: Diaspora + city-resident community channels; PLG via city-level free guide.
retention_loop: Per-user trip history + local trust graph lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Local-resident contributor network + traveler taste corpus compounds.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: 10 cities. Stage 2: top-50 globally. Stage 3: full local-experience marketplace platform.
failure_avoidance: commoditization_collapse: local trust + personalization moat vs TripAdvisor
unsustainable_unit_economics: marketplace + subscription
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for local + traveler; both sides win.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-city local picks, traveler taste signals.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + safety reviews disputes; ops verifies new contributors.

ui_ux_invocation: Traveler asks 'where should I eat tonight in Lisbon'; agent returns 1-3 with voice context.

hook: A lost-luggage advocate that recovers your bag + cash compensation while you sleep.
core_problem: 5.5M bags mishandled/yr globally; airlines pay only when forced; consumers eat the loss.
ai_leverage: Tracking agent ingests airline + airport tag scans; advocacy agent files claims + escalates per Montreal Convention.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'paste your tag number' wedge + corporate travel partnerships.
retention_loop: Per-airline outcome corpus + traveler trust lock.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C lost luggage. Stage 2: full traveler-rights advocacy (delays, denied boarding). Stage 3: licensed claims-as-a-service for cards + insurers.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: Montreal Convention + DOT consumer protection
unsustainable_unit_economics: outcome aligns ARR to wins

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + airline portal automation
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-airline claim corpus, tag scan history.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Ops reviews escalations to DOT; user approves any settlement.

ui_ux_invocation: User pastes tag number; agent runs claim; user sees recovered $.

hook: A travel-policy compliance agent that lets sales teams book the flight they want — within the rules.
core_problem: $300B/yr corporate travel suffers 15-25% off-policy spend; OBTs are clunky; finance fights with sales.
ai_leverage: Policy-interpretation agent reads travel guidelines + applies per-trip; pre-approval agent generates exception flows.

moat_potential.rationale: Sits between OBT + ERP; switching breaks both.

scalability_rationale: B2B sales cycle 6-9 months; once integrated, expansion fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: mid-market. Stage 2: enterprise. Stage 3: full corporate-spend AI platform.
failure_avoidance: fake_ai_trap: human-in-loop for any policy exception >$1k
commoditization_collapse: workflow integration moat
validation_invocation: Per-company spend + policy data is asymmetric; OBTs see only bookings.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-company policy, trip history, exception outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: CFO/finance approves policy changes; manager approves exceptions.

ui_ux_invocation: Traveler picks itinerary; agent flags + auto-approves within policy.

hook: A passport optimizer that tells you the best second citizenship for your tax + travel + family situation.
core_problem: 10M HNW individuals seek second citizenship; advisors charge 6 figures + 12-24 months; opaque.
ai_leverage: Eligibility agent matches user to programs (Portugal D7, Malta MEIN, Caribbean CBI); advisor agent orchestrates application.
scalability_rationale: HNW concierge model; high ARPU offsets low volume.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D7/CBI programs. Stage 2: full residency + citizenship marketplace. Stage 3: global mobility OS for HNW.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: per-jurisdiction immigration + tax laws
fake_ai_trap: licensed attorney signs every application
validation_invocation: Defensible regulatory + advisor moat; reject vanity inquiries.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-program eligibility, tax implications, success outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Bar-licensed attorney + tax advisor sign every application step.

ui_ux_invocation: User answers 12 questions; agent ranks 3 programs; concierge takes over.

hook: A pet-friendly travel planner that routes around airline embargoes + hotel blackouts for the 90M US pet owners.
core_problem: 44% of US households travel with pets; existing tools (BringFido) are listings, not planners; airline embargoes change weekly.
ai_leverage: Routing agent ingests airline pet policies + temperature embargoes; booking agent confirms pet-friendly hotel + ground.
distribution_strategy: Vet + pet-store partnerships; PLG via free 'is my flight pet-safe' wedge.
retention_loop: Per-pet travel history + airline rule corpus lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-airline + per-route pet-policy corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C pet-friendly travel. Stage 2: full pet-friendly hospitality + service marketplace. Stage 3: pet insurance + travel bundle.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: per-jurisdiction pet import + airline rules
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the airline-policy corpus
validation_invocation: Per-airline pet-policy data is asymmetric; BringFido is a listing.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Duffel + BringFido APIs
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-airline pet rules, temperature embargoes, hotel policies.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any booking >$2k; ops resolves disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: User says 'NYC to Lisbon with my Bulldog mid-July'; agent returns viable + safe options.
